experience_description: Join us to master the techniques of pasta fatta a mano (pasta made by hand). This 'Pasta Beginners' is specifically designed for the absolute pasta beginner. Guided by one of our specialist pasta chefs, you will learn artisan techniques and ancient traditions which have been passed down in Italy through the centuries. - Two hours pasta-making class with one of our expert chefs - Complimentary antipasti with your chef and new classmates on arrival - Unlimited Prosecco available throughout the class - Linen apron and beechwood pasta tools will be provided for your class - Sit down to enjoy the pasta you've created as a meal at the end of the class

experience_name: 24th March - Hackney Gelato with fresh pasta making!
experience_description: Celebrate European Gelato Day with pasta making & a tasting of Hackney Gelato's latest creations with Chef and founder of Hackney Gelato, Enrico Pavoncelli. Every guest will have the opportunity to win a year's supply of Hackney Gelato! Learn to make fresh pasta alongside your tasting for the perfect Italian experience! In this masterclass, Chef Enrico will guide you through a curated selection of gelato, sharing stories, techniques and the craft behind each recipe. Alongside your gelato tasting, your Pasta Evangelists Chef will guide you through the stages of pasta making, which you will sit down to eat at the end of the class with a delicious pasta sauce.

experience_description: Book Our Brand New Pasta Making Classes for Children! Give your child a taste of the Italian way of life with our hands-on, fun-filled pasta making class—just for kids! In Italy, pasta-making is a cherished tradition passed down through generations. Now, your little ones can experience this magical culinary journey right here with our expert, friendly, and super-fun Pasta Evangelists chefs! The class will last 1.5 hours which includes time for the children to eat their pasta. There will be a soft drink & Italian snack on arrival with all ingredients and aprons provided. The class is suitable for vegetarians and vegans. Parental Note: Parents don’t join the class, but must stay in the restaurant—why not enjoy a coffee, glass of wine, or a well-earned moment of peace?

experience_description: Chocolate Ravioli: A Sweet Twist on an Italian Classic Indulge in a one-of-a-kind culinary adventure where dessert meets tradition! In this interactive, hands-on class, you’ll master the art of crafting delicate ravioli from scratch—stuffed with creamy ricotta and rich chocolate. From mixing and rolling fresh pasta dough to shaping each perfect parcel, we’ll guide you step-by-step. Then, we’ll elevate your creation with a luxurious sauce of melted butter and velvety fresh cream. Enjoy a bowl of savoury fresh pasta at the end of class followed by your chocolate ravioli dessert - delicious! This two hour class will include antipasti on arrival, expert tuition from a Pasta Evangelists Chef and unlimited prosecco or soft drinks throughout the class. Enjoy a dish of savoury fresh pasta as part of the class and then enjoy your chocolate ravioli as dessert.

experience_description: Join us for a special culinary experience celebrating one of Italy’s most beloved pasta companions—pesto! Working entirely by hand, you’ll master three authentic variations: - Fresh Basil Pesto from Liguria—fragrant, vibrant, and timeless. - Pistachio Pesto from Sicily—rich, nutty, and irresistibly smooth. - Rocket, Sundried Tomato & Almond Pesto—a bold Sicilian twist with a hint of peppery bite. From selecting the finest ingredients to crushing and blending them in the traditional way, you’ll learn the secrets to perfect pesto every time. At the end of the class enjoy your freshly made pesto with a bowl of classic pasta or take it away to enjoy at home! Enjoy an antipasti on arrival before embarking on your pesto adventure. From selecting the finest ingredients to crushing and blending them in the traditional way, you’ll learn the secrets to perfect pesto every time. Once your fresh pesto trio is complete, choose your favourite to enjoy with perfectly cooked Pasta Evangelists pasta. Spaces are limited—book now to secure your spot!
